# data/

All climate data and computed outputs for the LTRisk project.

**Only `schema/` is committed** — everything else is gitignored and regenerated by scripts.

---

## Folder Layout

```
data/
├── schema/                              ← COMMITTED — source of truth for data contracts
│   ├── sites.json                       ← Site registry (lat/lon, capacity, EUL)
│   ├── variables.json                   ← Variable definitions (priority, units, API params)
│   ├── scvr_schema.json                 ← SCVR output column spec + methodology
│   ├── cmip6_raw_schema.json            ← Raw CMIP6 Parquet column spec
│   ├── noaa_schema.json                 ← NOAA GHCN-D observation column spec
│   ├── VARIABLES.md                     ← Human-readable variable reference
│   └── README.md                        ← Schema usage guide
│
├── cache/                               ← NOT committed — download cache
│   └── thredds/
│       ├── *.nc                         ← Cached NetCDF (one per model/scenario/variable/year/location)
│       ├── model_variant_cache.json     ← Discovered realization+grid per model
│       ├── model_probe_cache.json       ← Boolean availability per model
│       └── fetch_report_*.json          ← Timestamped fetch run summaries
│
├── raw/                                 ← NOT committed — reserved for future ingested data
│   ├── cmip6/                           ← (currently unused — production uses cache/thredds/)
│   └── noaa/                            ← NOAA GHCN-D station observations
│
├── processed/                           ← NOT committed — computed outputs
│   ├── scvr/<site_id>/                  ← SCVR Parquet + JSON from compute_scvr.py
│   ├── presentation/<site_id>/          ← PNG plots + CSV from visualize_ensemble.py
│   └── hcr/<site_id>/                   ← HCR results from NB04
│
└── extra/                               ← NOT committed — reference material (asset registry, project finance)
```

---

## Data Flow

```
scripts/data/fetch_cmip6.py          →  data/cache/thredds/*.nc
scripts/analysis/scvr/compute_scvr.py →  data/processed/scvr/<site_id>/*.parquet
```

1. `fetch_cmip6.py` downloads daily CMIP6 data from NASA THREDDS and caches as NetCDF
2. `compute_scvr.py` reads from cache, computes SCVR, outputs Parquet + JSON

---

## SCVR Output Files

Produced by `compute_scvr.py` in `data/processed/scvr/<site_id>/`:

| File | Contents |
|---|---|
| `cmip6_ensemble_scvr.parquet` | Main SCVR — one row per variable × scenario (all models pooled) |
| `cmip6_scvr_decade.parquet` | Decade-resolved SCVR (3 × 10-year windows) |
| `cmip6_scvr_annual.parquet` | Annual SCVR (anchor-fit for temp, period-average for others) |
| `cmip6_shape_metrics.parquet` | Distribution stats per period (mean, variance, P95, P99, etc.) |
| `scvr_report.json` | Run metadata, summary, GEV fits |

See `schema/scvr_schema.json` for full column definitions.

---

## Schema Reference

All schema files in `schema/` are the source of truth for data contracts.
See [`schema/README.md`](schema/README.md) for details on each file.

---

## Adding a New Site

1. Add entry to `schema/sites.json` with all required fields
2. Fetch data: `python scripts/data/fetch_cmip6.py --site your_new_site`
3. Compute SCVR: `python scripts/analysis/scvr/compute_scvr.py --site your_new_site`
